title: viola eugeniae subsp. levieri
intro: Viola eugeniae subsp. levieri, also known as Levieri's pansy or Viola levieri, is a species of flowering plant in the pansy family (Violaceae). This plant is used in traditional medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Viola eugeniae subsp. levieri include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant often involve drying and infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, and it can also be consumed as a supplement or used topically in creams and ointments.
